tools.name: 20200801.acceptEulas
tools.description: Accept EULAs.

tools.name: 20200801.createLaunchProfile
tools.description: Create a launch profile.

tools.name: 20200801.createStreamingImage
tools.description: Creates a streaming image resource in a studio.

tools.name: 20200801.createStreamingSession
tools.description:
Creates a streaming session in a studio.

After invoking this operation, you must poll GetStreamingSession until the streaming session is in the READY state.

tools.name: 20200801.createStreamingSessionStream
tools.description:
Creates a streaming session stream for a streaming session.

After invoking this API, invoke GetStreamingSessionStream with the returned streamId to poll the resource until it is in the READY state.

tools.name: 20200801.createStudio
tools.description:
Create a new studio.

When creating a studio, two IAM roles must be provided: the admin role and the user role. These roles are assumed by your users when they log in to the Nimble Studio portal.

The user role must have the AmazonNimbleStudio-StudioUser managed policy attached for the portal to function properly.

The admin role must have the AmazonNimbleStudio-StudioAdmin managed policy attached for the portal to function properly.

You may optionally specify a KMS key in the StudioEncryptionConfiguration.

In Nimble Studio, resource names, descriptions, initialization scripts, and other data you provide are always encrypted at rest using an KMS key. By default, this key is owned by Amazon Web Services and managed on your behalf. You may provide your own KMS key when calling CreateStudio to encrypt this data using a key you own and manage.

When providing an KMS key during studio creation, Nimble Studio creates KMS grants in your account to provide your studio user and admin roles access to these KMS keys.

If you delete this grant, the studio will no longer be accessible to your portal users.

If you delete the studio KMS key, your studio will no longer be accessible.

tools.name: 20200801.createStudioComponent
tools.description: Creates a studio component resource.

tools.name: 20200801.deleteLaunchProfile
tools.description: Permanently delete a launch profile.

tools.name: 20200801.deleteLaunchProfileMember
tools.description: Delete a user from launch profile membership.

tools.name: 20200801.deleteStreamingImage
tools.description: Delete streaming image.

tools.name: 20200801.deleteStreamingSession
tools.description:
Deletes streaming session resource.

After invoking this operation, use GetStreamingSession to poll the resource until it transitions to a DELETED state.

A streaming session will count against your streaming session quota until it is marked DELETED.

tools.name: 20200801.deleteStudio
tools.description: Delete a studio resource.

tools.name: 20200801.deleteStudioComponent
tools.description: Deletes a studio component resource.

tools.name: 20200801.deleteStudioMember
tools.description: Delete a user from studio membership.

tools.name: 20200801.getEula
tools.description: Get EULA.

tools.name: 20200801.getLaunchProfile
tools.description: Get a launch profile.

tools.name: 20200801.getLaunchProfileDetails
tools.description: Launch profile details include the launch profile resource and summary information of resources that are used by, or available to, the launch profile. This includes the name and description of all studio components used by the launch profiles, and the name and description of streaming images that can be used with this launch profile.

tools.name: 20200801.getLaunchProfileInitialization
tools.description: Get a launch profile initialization.

tools.name: 20200801.getLaunchProfileMember
tools.description: Get a user persona in launch profile membership.

tools.name: 20200801.getStreamingImage
tools.description: Get streaming image.

tools.name: 20200801.getStreamingSession
tools.description:
Gets StreamingSession resource.

Invoke this operation to poll for a streaming session state while creating or deleting a session.

tools.name: 20200801.getStreamingSessionBackup
tools.description:
Gets StreamingSessionBackup resource.

Invoke this operation to poll for a streaming session backup while stopping a streaming session.

tools.name: 20200801.getStreamingSessionStream
tools.description:
Gets a StreamingSessionStream for a streaming session.

Invoke this operation to poll the resource after invoking CreateStreamingSessionStream.

After the StreamingSessionStream changes to the READY state, the url property will contain a stream to be used with the DCV streaming client.

tools.name: 20200801.getStudio
tools.description: Get a studio resource.

tools.name: 20200801.getStudioComponent
tools.description: Gets a studio component resource.

tools.name: 20200801.getStudioMember
tools.description: Get a user's membership in a studio.

tools.name: 20200801.listEulaAcceptances
tools.description: List EULA acceptances.

tools.name: 20200801.listEulas
tools.description: List EULAs.

tools.name: 20200801.listLaunchProfileMembers
tools.description: Get all users in a given launch profile membership.

tools.name: 20200801.listLaunchProfiles
tools.description: List all the launch profiles a studio.

tools.name: 20200801.listStreamingImages
tools.description:
List the streaming image resources available to this studio.

This list will contain both images provided by Amazon Web Services, as well as streaming images that you have created in your studio.

tools.name: 20200801.listStreamingSessionBackups
tools.description: Lists the backups of a streaming session in a studio.

tools.name: 20200801.listStreamingSessions
tools.description: Lists the streaming sessions in a studio.

tools.name: 20200801.listStudioComponents
tools.description: Lists the StudioComponents in a studio.

tools.name: 20200801.listStudioMembers
tools.description:
Get all users in a given studio membership.

ListStudioMembers only returns admin members.

tools.name: 20200801.listStudios
tools.description: List studios in your Amazon Web Services accounts in the requested Amazon Web Services Region.

tools.name: 20200801.listTagsForResource
tools.description:
Gets the tags for a resource, given its Amazon Resource Names (ARN).

This operation supports ARNs for all resource types in Nimble Studio that support tags, including studio, studio component, launch profile, streaming image, and streaming session. All resources that can be tagged will contain an ARN property, so you do not have to create this ARN yourself.

tools.name: 20200801.putLaunchProfileMembers
tools.description: Add/update users with given persona to launch profile membership.

tools.name: 20200801.putStudioMembers
tools.description: Add/update users with given persona to studio membership.

tools.name: 20200801.startStreamingSession
tools.description: Transitions sessions from the STOPPED state into the READY state. The START_IN_PROGRESS state is the intermediate state between the STOPPED and READY states.

tools.name: 20200801.startStudioSsoConfigurationRepair
tools.description:
Repairs the IAM Identity Center configuration for a given studio.

If the studio has a valid IAM Identity Center configuration currently associated with it, this operation will fail with a validation error.

If the studio does not have a valid IAM Identity Center configuration currently associated with it, then a new IAM Identity Center application is created for the studio and the studio is changed to the READY state.

After the IAM Identity Center application is repaired, you must use the Amazon Nimble Studio console to add administrators and users to your studio.

tools.name: 20200801.stopStreamingSession
tools.description: Transitions sessions from the READY state into the STOPPED state. The STOP_IN_PROGRESS state is the intermediate state between the READY and STOPPED states.

tools.name: 20200801.tagResource
tools.description: Creates tags for a resource, given its ARN.

tools.name: 20200801.untagResource
tools.description: Deletes the tags for a resource.

tools.name: 20200801.updateLaunchProfile
tools.description: Update a launch profile.

tools.name: 20200801.updateLaunchProfileMember
tools.description: Update a user persona in launch profile membership.

tools.name: 20200801.updateStreamingImage
tools.description: Update streaming image.

tools.name: 20200801.updateStudio
tools.description:
Update a Studio resource.

Currently, this operation only supports updating the displayName of your studio.

tools.name: 20200801.updateStudioComponent
tools.description: Updates a studio component resource.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
